Best FPS Boost Modpack for Forge
This modpack is specially designed for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 to give you the maximum FPS Boost ⚡ and a completely lag-free gameplay experience ????. ???? Comes with Replay Mod ???? to record and replay your gameplay. ???? Includes Zoom Mod ???? so you can easily focus on distant targets.

Fully compatible with any other mods; no conflicts. Works on Low-End PCs ???? and also optimized for High-End PCs ⚡.

✨ This modpack allows users to get the most out of Minecraft: higher FPS, lower lag, and a professional setup.
